name: Aberystwyth Cliff & Constitution Hill
terrain: Prom tarmac, grassy cliff, funicular option
highlights: Seafront to cliff-top camera obscura with sweeping Cardigan Bay horizon.
points_of_interest: Royal Pier; castle ruins; camera obscura; funicular (1896)
viewpoints: Summit panorama across Cardigan Bay; Snowdonia on clear days
water_features: Cardigan Bay; Ystwyth and Rheidol estuary
food_drink_nearby: Ultracomida; Medina; The Glengower; Baravin; Coastal Vines
hazards_notes: Cliff section exposed in wind; funicular runs seasonally
